word: G3072 - Λυκαονιστί - Lykaonistí - loo-kah-on-is-tee' - In the speech of Lycaonia

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: In the speech of Lycaonia
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adverb / வினையடை
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: Adverb from a derivative of G3071; Lycaonistically, that is, in the language of the Lycaonians: - in the speech of Lycaonia.
